docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, MARTINA
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, DIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVAS, MARTINA $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,385.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $110.00) SERVED JUL-01-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, MARTINA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF DIANA ALVAREZ (APPEARING ON ZOOM AS DIANA ALVAREZ SANTOS) IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT MARTINA RIVAS, ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPERTER, LAURA JOOSSE IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ALVAREZ, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, MARTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-25-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-15-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
